headline: OOH Expert | Board member | M & A | Capital Raising
summary:
After 32 years building oOh! Media and working across all aspects of the out of home industry, I am embarking on a new venture in 2023.
I continue to be passionate about out of home media in Australia and globally.
location_str: North Sydney, New South Wales, Australia

experiences.title: Chief Commercial and Operations Officer
experiences.description:
Noel has close to 30 years’ experience in the out-of-home media industry, covering all critical business functions from sales to product development, asset rollouts to operations and commercial contract management to business development. 
Through this diversified experience, Noel brings valuable insight to decision making and leadership across multiple aspects of the oOh! business. 
Over the years, he’s been instrumental in the business’ growth, both organically and through acquisition. Notably, his adept management of Sports & Outdoor Media post-acquisition was pivotal to the seamless integration and continued growth of that regional billboard business within the oOh! Group. 
Noel has also been involved in developing and executing long term business strategy following the acquisitions of large format and/ or airport media specialists, Media Puzzle and Eye Corp, as well as the management of expert printing company, Cactus Printing. 
In addition to relationship management with media clients and agencies, Noel has extensive experience overseeing complex commercial contracts and has a demonstrated track record of delivering value to both our commercial partners and oOh! through his open and proactive approach. Noel has been key to developing and maintaining oOh!’s long running relationships with Roads & Maritime Services (NSW), VicTrack (Victoria), Department of Transport & Main Roads (Qld) and the Department of Planning, Transport & Infrastructure (SA), amongst others.
Having been a member of oOh!’s Executive Leadership Team for 20 years, Noel is cognizant of not only the history of the industry and the business but is among the best placed media leaders in the country to identify the opportunities and implement the ideas that will drive the long term growth of our business into the future.

experiences.title: Group Director - Road
experiences.description:
Noel has over 25 years' experience in outdoor advertising covering all aspects of the profession. He has spent considerable time selling and developing outdoor media in all markets across Australia. Noel has been instrumental in guiding oOh! through a number of company acquisitions. Noel has been a member of the senior Management team for 22 years and is heavily involved in all facets of the business. As part of Noel's role as Group Director, oOh! Road he has extensive experience in dealing with State Government departments including RMS (NSW), VicTrack (VIC), TMR (QLD) and Queensland Transport (QLD).
Road's recent performance:
- Continued expansion of digital offering, with 25 sites at premium locations converted to digital – an increase of 17 from last year.
- Delivered Australia’s largest full motion billboard at Melbourne’s Bourke Street mall.
Secured the highly sought after RMS contract for 13 large format signs across Sydney’s road network.

accomplishment_organisations.title: Board Member
accomplishment_organisations.description: The Outdoor Media Association (OMA) is the peak industry body for the Out of Home (OOH) industry.  The OMA is governed by a Board of Directors elected by the membership. OMA members adhere to an industry Code of Ethics to ensure businesses operate responsibly and abide by the industry's regulatory framework. To date, the OMA has 35 members and operates nationally.
